Manufacturing test applications and metadata headers for Pebble firmware, including recovery and low power apps.

## Folders
- **[recovery_first_use_app](recovery_first_use_app/README.md)**: Manages button combinations and implements the "Recovery First Use" app for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[mfg_accel_app.c](mfg_accel_app.c.md)**: An application for testing accelerometer data display on a Pebble device.
- **[mfg_accel_app.h](mfg_accel_app.h.md)**: Provides a function to get metadata for the manufacturing accelerometer application.
- **[mfg_als_app.c](mfg_als_app.c.md)**: An application for reading and displaying ambient light sensor data with optional test result recording.
- **[mfg_als_app.h](mfg_als_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the manufacturing ALS application.
- **[mfg_bt_sig_rf_app.c](mfg_bt_sig_rf_app.c.md)**: Implements a Bluetooth SIG RF test application for Pebble firmware with UI and event handling.
- **[mfg_bt_sig_rf_app.h](mfg_bt_sig_rf_app.h.md)**: Header file for a test app that activates bt_sig_rf mode for testing purposes.
- **[mfg_btle_app.c](mfg_btle_app.c.md)**: Implements a Bluetooth Low Energy (BTLE) test application for managing and executing TX/RX tests on a Pebble device.
- **[mfg_btle_app.h](mfg_btle_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the manufacturing Bluetooth Low Energy app.
- **[mfg_button_app.c](mfg_button_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing button test application for Pebble devices, handling button presses and test results.
- **[mfg_button_app.h](mfg_button_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the manufacturing button application.
- **[mfg_certification_app.c](mfg_certification_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing certification app with UI elements and vibration patterns for Pebble devices.
- **[mfg_certification_app.h](mfg_certification_app.h.md)**: Header file for a test app that adjusts hardware settings for certification testing.
- **[mfg_display_app.c](mfg_display_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing display application for Pebble devices, supporting various test patterns and user interactions.
- **[mfg_display_app.h](mfg_display_app.h.md)**: Test app for showing various display patterns with process management integration.
- **[mfg_display_calibration_app.c](mfg_display_calibration_app.c.md)**: A manufacturing display calibration application for Pebble firmware, handling UI and state management.
- **[mfg_display_calibration_app.h](mfg_display_calibration_app.h.md)**: Test app for display calibration with function to get process metadata.
- **[mfg_hrm_app.c](mfg_hrm_app.c.md)**: Heart rate monitor application for Pebble devices, handling initialization, events, and deinitialization.
- **[mfg_hrm_app.h](mfg_hrm_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the manufacturing heart rate monitor app.
- **[mfg_menu_app.c](mfg_menu_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing menu application for Pebble firmware with various test and utility options.
- **[mfg_menu_app.h](mfg_menu_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving manufacturing menu app information in Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_runin_app.c](mfg_runin_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing run-in test application for Pebble devices, managing battery states and user interactions.
- **[mfg_runin_app.h](mfg_runin_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving manufacturing run-in application process metadata.
- **[mfg_vibe_app.c](mfg_vibe_app.c.md)**: Implements a manufacturing vibration test application for Pebble devices with a user interface.
- **[mfg_vibe_app.h](mfg_vibe_app.h.md)**: Header file for a test app that vibrates 5 times and exits, with process metadata retrieval.
- **[prf_low_power_app.c](prf_low_power_app.c.md)**: Implements a low power application for managing battery charge state and UI updates on Pebble devices.
- **[prf_low_power_app.h](prf_low_power_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the low power application in Pebble firmware.
